subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Abhá Kingdom! This world of existence is the arena for the acquisition of divine qualities and heavenly attributes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی این عالم امکان میدان اکتساب شئون رحمانیه است و اتصاف
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @need for an educator, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @idle fancies; lust and passion
